ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business or facility */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address (if applicable) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the facility's address */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to the facility's location on Google Maps */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type (e.g., Hospital, Pharmacy) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was established */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing the operating hours for each day of the week */,
  "emergency_services" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the facility offers emergency services */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the facility is wheelchair accessible */,
  "public_transportation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if public transportation is available nearby */,
  "facility_size" INTEGER /* Size of the facility in square feet or meters */,
  "facility_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type (e.g., Hospital, Pharmacy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the facility type is residential (e.g., nursing homes) */,
  "average_stay" INTEGER /* Average length of stay in days for inpatient facilities */,
  "special_requirements" TEXT /* JSON object containing any special requirements or services offered by the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contact information */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the contact info belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the facility */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the facility */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the facility's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility providing the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered by the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "is_insurance_accepted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the service accepts insurance */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the service */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the service in minutes */,
  "service_requirements" TEXT /* JSON object containing any special requirements or prerequisites for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Healthcare Provider) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's address (street, city, state, zip) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the facility */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the facility */,
  "geofence_radius" INTEGER /* Radius of the geofence around the facility (in meters) */,
  "nearest_hospital" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest hospital (if applicable) */,
  "nearest_pharmacy" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest pharmacy (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_nearest_hospital FOREIGN KEY ("nearest_hospital") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_nearest_pharmacy FOREIGN KEY ("nearest_pharmacy") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user about the facility */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Text describing the reason the review was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Text describing the reason the feedback was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility subject to regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the compliance */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "inspector_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility holding the license */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued to the facility */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Name of the authority that issued the license */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license needs to be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
